name: security.passkey.attestation
title: Security:Passkey:Attestation
description: The declaration to configure the device to allow WebAuthn enterprise attestation for certain passkeys.

payloadkeys.title: Attestation identity asset reference.
payloadkeys.content: The identifier of an asset declaration that contains the identity to install and use for passkey attestation.

payloadkeys.title: Attestation identity key is extractable
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the private key for the attestation identity is extractable in the keychain.

payloadkeys.title: Relying parties
payloadkeys.content: An array of the relying parties to allow enterprise attestation.
